Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 178 

POA_DGNS_E_CD_CNT 

LABEL: Count of Present on Admission (POA) Diagnosis E Codes 

DESCRIPTION: The count of the number of Present on Admission (POA) codes associated with the diagnosis E codes 
reported on the Inpatient/SNF claim. 

SHORT NAME: POA_DGNS_E_CD_CNT 

LONG NAME: POA_DGNS_E_CD_CNT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: 0 to 12 

COMMENT: This field was new in 2009. 

The E
